description: Microscopy phytoplankton counts for the SOMLIT-Astan time-series, published by Rigaut-Jalabert et al. (2021) on Zenodo. Restructured to fit the challenge dataset format and provided in the challenge as microscopy_harmonised.csv. Used as input to the MARCO-BOLO Data Analysis Challenge.
name: Morphological phytoplankton counts for the SOMLIT-Astan time-series (2007-2017)
